# Bonzomatic

- Repo: `https://github.com/Gargaj/Bonzomatic`
- Local checkout: `references\Bonzomatic`
- Status: included, but with scope caveat

Why it is relevant now:

- Bonzomatic is a live shader-coding tool with built-in **audio input** handling.
- The README explicitly mentions microphone / loopback capture for generating **FFT textures**.
- This makes it relevant to audio-driven shader workflows, even if it is not the same thing as Shadertoy-style standalone sound-shader synthesis.

This placeholder should later confirm the exact audio uniforms/textures, whether any direct synth path exists, and how close the model is to Shadertoy sound shaders.
